name: wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge bases for Codex. Build topic-scoped wikis, track inventory, index datasets, ingest sources and external collections, compile articles, run truth-seeking audits, query, lint, research, and generate outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Build, inventory, index data, audit, and maintain research wikis
interface.longDescription: Bundle the llm-wiki workflow for Codex: initialize a wiki, track inventory, index large datasets without copying them into the wiki, ingest sources and external collections, compile articles, audit outputs and provenance, query knowledge, lint structure, run research, and generate outputs.
defaultPrompt: Research a new topic and compile it into a wiki.
Track this source queue as inventory, then ingest selected candidates into my wiki.
Index this large dataset with a manifest, schema notes, samples, and query recipes.
Ingest these notes or an external source collection into my wiki and update the indexes.
Audit this wiki output and tell me if I can trust it.
Lint this wiki and fix structural issues.
